race.comment: HOPELESS ROMANTIC (3) did a fair job on debut last time out, finishing 1.75 lengths from the winner in second over 1300m at Wangaratta. Will be better for that, extra trip doesn't look a major issue, especially from the gun draw. YOU SAID WHAT (12) finished third last start over 1214m at Moe, beaten half a length. Suitably placed so anticipating a big run again. WILD RUBY (11) finished second last start over 1307m at Stawell to make it six minor placings from 10 runs. Has a solid record at this track, finishing in the top-three two times, so she's worth including. IMPENDING SWAN (9) hit the line well over 1200m first-up, so looks even better suited this trip with extra fitness under the belt.
